title: Anaimalai Tiger Reserve
tagline: Anaimalai Tiger Reserve — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Anamalai Tiger Reserve, earlier known as Indira Gandhi Wildlife Sanctuary and National Park and as Anaimalai Wildlife Sanctuary, is a protected area in the Anaimalai Hills of Polla
overview.description: Anamalai Tiger Reserve, earlier known as Indira Gandhi Wildlife Sanctuary and National Park and as Anaimalai Wildlife Sanctuary, is a protected area in the Anaimalai Hills of Pollachi and Valparai taluks of Coimbatore District and Udumalaipettai taluk in Tiruppur District, Tamil Nadu, India. The Tamil Nadu Environment and Forests Department by a notification dated 27 June 2007, declared an extent of 958.59 km2 that encompassed the erstwhile IGWLS&NP or Anaimalai Wildlife Sanctuary, as Anaimalai Tiger Reserve under the Wildlife Protection Act, 1972. topPlaces.name: Karian Shola National Park
topPlaces.description: Karian Shola National Park is a protected area in the Western Ghats, India, nominated as a national park in 1989. The Western Ghats are a chain of mountains running down the west of India parallel with the coast some 30 to 50 km (19 to 31 mi) inland.

topPlaces.name: Chinnar Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Chinnar Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the Idukki district of India's Kerala state. It is one of 18 wildlife sanctuaries among the protected areas of Kerala.

items.note: Karian Shola National Park is a protected area in the Western Ghats, India, nominated as a national park in 1989. The Western Ghats are a chain of mountains running down the west of India parallel with the coast some 30 to 50 km (19 to 31 mi) inland.
Chinnar Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the Idukki district of India's Kerala state. It is one of 18 wildlife sanctuaries among the protected areas of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Anaimalai Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The best time to visit Anaimalai Tiger Reserve is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Anaimalai Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (74 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (73 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Anaimalai Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Anaimalai Tiger Reserve at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Anaimalai Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: Stays in Anaimalai Tiger Reserve start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Anaimalai Tiger Reserve?
faq.a: The top attractions are Karian Shola National Park, Chinnar Wildlife Sanctuary.
